title: Council of Ministers to aid and advise Governor
description: Provides that the Governor acts on the aid and advice of the Council of Ministers, except where constitutional discretion is explicitly allowed.

title: Other provisions as to Ministers
description: Covers the terms, salaries, and conditions of service of Ministers in states, including collective responsibility to the Legislative Assembly.

title: Constitution of Legislatures in States
description: Defines the constitutional structure of state legislatures and positions the Governor within that structure.

title: Sessions of the State Legislature, prorogation and dissolution
description: Empowers the Governor to summon, prorogue, and dissolve the State Legislative Assembly. Requires sessions to be held within six months of the previous session.

title: Special address by the Governor
description: Requires the Governor to address the Legislature at the first session after each general election and at the commencement of the first session of each year.

title: Assent to Bills
description: Empowers the Governor to assent, withhold assent, return certain bills for reconsideration, or reserve bills for the President.

title: Failure of Constitutional Machinery in States
description: Allows President's Rule where governance cannot be carried on according to the Constitution, based in part on a Governor's report.

title: Temporary provisions with respect to the State of Jammu and Kashmir
description: Granted special autonomous status to Jammu and Kashmir. Was abrogated in 2019, ending the state's special constitutional provisions.
